name: ◁ Crumbled Falafel Salad
servings: prep time: 15 minutes, plus overnight soaking

ingredients.item:
FALAFEL
2½ cups (500 g) dried chickpeas
6 cups (1.4 L) cold water
ingredients.original:
FALAFEL
2½ cups (500 g) dried chickpeas
6 cups (1.4 L) cold water

ingredients.item: 2 small yellow onions, cut into quarters
ingredients.original: 2 small yellow onions, cut into quarters

ingredients.item: 10 large cloves garlic
ingredients.original: 10 large cloves garlic

ingredients.item: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: 2 cups (100 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro
ingredients.original: 1 cup (40 g) packed roughly chopped fresh cilantro

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon baking powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon baking powder

ingredients.item: ¾ cup (180 ml) plus 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided
ingredients.original: ¾ cup (180 ml) plus 3 tablespoons olive oil, divided

ingredients.item: 2 teaspoons kosher salt
ingredients.original: 2 teaspoons kosher salt

ingredients.item: 3 teaspoons ground cumin
ingredients.original: 3 teaspoons ground cumin

ingredients.item: 3 teaspoons ground coriander
ingredients.original: 3 teaspoons ground coriander

ingredients.item:
DRESSING
½ cup (120 ml) tahini
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice
ingredients.original:
DRESSING
½ cup (120 ml) tahini
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice

ingredients.item: 1 large clove garlic
ingredients.original: 1 large clove garlic

ingredients.item: 1 green onion, roughly chopped
ingredients.original: 1 green onion, roughly chopped

ingredients.item: 6 leaves basil
ingredients.original: 6 leaves basil

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (13 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (13 g) packed roughly chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: ¼ cup (36 g) chopped pickled turnips (or dill pickles)
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (36 g) chopped pickled turnips (or dill pickles)

ingredients.item: 1 large tomato, chopped (optional)
ingredients.original: 1 large tomato, chopped (optional)

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE FALAFEL: Place the dried chickpeas in a large bowl and cover them with the cold water. Stir in the baking soda and leave them to soak overnight; they will double in size. When ready to use, drain the chickpeas and pat them dry.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE FALAFEL: Place the dried chickpeas in a large bowl and cover them with the cold water. Stir in the baking soda and leave them to soak overnight; they will double in size. When ready to use, drain the chickpeas and pat them dry.

ingredients.item: 2 Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and place a rack on the bottom.
ingredients.original: 2 Preheat the oven to 450°F (230°C) and place a rack on the bottom.

ingredients.item: 3 Add the yellow onions and 10 garlic cloves to a large food processor and pulse for a few seconds until finely chopped. Add the soaked chickpeas, 2 cups (100 g) parsley, cilantro, baking powder, 3 tablespoons of the oil, 2 teaspoons salt, cumin, coriander, and pepper. Process for 5 to 7 minutes, until the ingredients are mashed together and the mixture has a dough-like consistency, pausing to scrape the bottom of the food processor and ensure all the ingredients are incorporated. If the mixture is still crumbly, continue to pulse in the food processor until it holds together.
ingredients.original: 3 Add the yellow onions and 10 garlic cloves to a large food processor and pulse for a few seconds until finely chopped. Add the soaked chickpeas, 2 cups (100 g) parsley, cilantro, baking powder, 3 tablespoons of the oil, 2 teaspoons salt, cumin, coriander, and pepper. Process for 5 to 7 minutes, until the ingredients are mashed together and the mixture has a dough-like consistency, pausing to scrape the bottom of the food processor and ensure all the ingredients are incorporated. If the mixture is still crumbly, continue to pulse in the food processor until it holds together.
